title: Magical Realism Portrait AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-realistic magical-realism library portrait built around 9:16 竖版，高精度 3D CG 东方幻想女性角色海报，3D CG oriental fantasy female character portrait，anime-style 3D CG character art，semi-realistic 3D character, tiny miniature version of the same woman standing on the tabletop, 服装为黑色东方幻想轻战斗礼裙，上半身为黑色修身吊带连衣裙结构，材质为高级丝缎与轻微皮革感混合，布料有真实褶皱、柔和高光与立体裁剪。, and 背景为明亮开阔的幻想天空场景，蓝天、白云、远处云海与柔和太阳光共同构成通透空间。. Subject: 9:16 竖版，高精度 3D CG 东方幻想女性角色海报，3D CG oriental fantasy female character portrait，anime-style 3D CG character art，semi-realistic 3D character carefully holds and positions tiny miniature version of the same woman standing on the tabletop; the miniature wears 服装为黑色东方幻想轻战斗礼裙，上半身为黑色修身吊带连衣裙结构，材质为高级丝缎与轻微皮革感混合，布料有真实褶皱、柔和高光与立体裁剪。 and reads as a delicate tiny version of the full-sized subject. Scene: 背景为明亮开阔的幻想天空场景，蓝天、白云、远处云海与柔和太阳光共同构成通透空间。 creates the cozy vintage environment, with aged books, antique wood, warm wall sconces, and shallow background depth. Composition: Fixed cinematic desk portrait: full-sized subject seated behind the antique desk, hands gently shaping or guiding the tiny tabletop figure, miniature placed clearly in the foreground-middle, face readable, tailoring tools arranged around the scene, and shallow depth of field. Signature Elements: Tiny self-portrait figure on the tabletop, full-sized subject shaping the miniature, antique library desk, tailoring tools, warm sconces, aged books, glowing particles, and intimate magical-realism mood. Style: Ultra-realistic cinematic magical realism with lifelike portrait texture, 8K detail, cozy vintage-library atmosphere, delicate scale illusion, and high-end storybook editorial polish. Color Palette: Fixed warm amber library glow, aged book browns, antique wood tones, soft skin tones, emerald or jewel-toned miniature dress accents, and tiny golden particle highlights. Lighting: Warm amber light from antique wall sconces, soft natural shadows, gentle highlights on face and hands, and a subtle magical shimmer around the miniature figure. Camera: Cinematic portrait framing with shallow depth of field, desk-level perspective, sharp focus on hands, face, miniature figure, and key tailoring props. Materials: 额前有轻盈碎发与不规则刘海，发丝细节清晰，带真实高光与柔顺质感。 remain visible with aged paper, wood grain, fabric texture, thread, metal scissors, miniature dress fabric, and glowing particle detail. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Theme: Ultra-realistic magical-realism library portrait built around 9:16 竖版，高精度 3D CG 东方幻想女性角色海报，3D CG oriental fantasy female character portrait，anime-style 3D CG character art，semi-realistic 3D character, tiny miniature self-portrait figure posed like a delicate living doll on the desk, 服装为黑色东方幻想轻战斗礼裙，上半身为黑色修身吊带连衣裙结构，材质为高级丝缎与轻微皮革感混合，布料有真实褶皱、柔和高光与立体裁剪。, and 背景为明亮开阔的幻想天空场景，蓝天、白云、远处云海与柔和太阳光共同构成通透空间。. Subject: 9:16 竖版，高精度 3D CG 东方幻想女性角色海报，3D CG oriental fantasy female character portrait，anime-style 3D CG character art，semi-realistic 3D character carefully holds and positions tiny miniature self-portrait figure posed like a delicate living doll on the desk; the miniature wears 服装为黑色东方幻想轻战斗礼裙，上半身为黑色修身吊带连衣裙结构，材质为高级丝缎与轻微皮革感混合，布料有真实褶皱、柔和高光与立体裁剪。 and reads as a delicate tiny version of the full-sized subject. Scene: 背景为明亮开阔的幻想天空场景，蓝天、白云、远处云海与柔和太阳光共同构成通透空间。 creates the cozy vintage environment, with aged books, antique wood, warm wall sconces, and shallow background depth. Composition: Fixed cinematic desk portrait: full-sized subject seated behind the antique desk, hands gently shaping or guiding the tiny tabletop figure, miniature placed clearly in the foreground-middle, face readable, tailoring tools arranged around the scene, and shallow depth of field. Signature Elements: Tiny self-portrait figure on the tabletop, full-sized subject shaping the miniature, antique library desk, tailoring tools, warm sconces, aged books, glowing particles, and intimate magical-realism mood. Style: Ultra-realistic cinematic magical realism with lifelike portrait texture, 8K detail, cozy vintage-library atmosphere, delicate scale illusion, and high-end storybook editorial polish. Color Palette: Fixed warm amber library glow, aged book browns, antique wood tones, soft skin tones, emerald or jewel-toned miniature dress accents, and tiny golden particle highlights. Lighting: Warm amber light from antique wall sconces, soft natural shadows, gentle highlights on face and hands, and a subtle magical shimmer around the miniature figure. Camera: Cinematic portrait framing with shallow depth of field, desk-level perspective, sharp focus on hands, face, miniature figure, and key tailoring props. Materials: 额前有轻盈碎发与不规则刘海，发丝细节清晰，带真实高光与柔顺质感。 remain visible with aged paper, wood grain, fabric texture, thread, metal scissors, miniature dress fabric, and glowing particle detail. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Theme: Ultra-realistic magical-realism library portrait built around 9:16 竖版，高精度 3D CG 东方幻想女性角色海报，3D CG oriental fantasy female character portrait，anime-style 3D CG character art，semi-realistic 3D character, tiny miniature version of the same woman standing on the tabletop, 服装为黑色东方幻想轻战斗礼裙，上半身为黑色修身吊带连衣裙结构，材质为高级丝缎与轻微皮革感混合，布料有真实褶皱、柔和高光与立体裁剪。, and 背景为明亮开阔的幻想天空场景，蓝天、白云、远处云海与柔和太阳光共同构成通透空间。. Subject: 9:16 竖版，高精度 3D CG 东方幻想女性角色海报，3D CG oriental fantasy female character portrait，anime-style 3D CG character art，semi-realistic 3D character carefully holds and positions tiny miniature version of the same woman standing on the tabletop; the miniature wears 服装为黑色东方幻想轻战斗礼裙，上半身为黑色修身吊带连衣裙结构，材质为高级丝缎与轻微皮革感混合，布料有真实褶皱、柔和高光与立体裁剪。 and reads as a delicate tiny version of the full-sized subject. Scene: 背景为明亮开阔的幻想天空场景，蓝天、白云、远处云海与柔和太阳光共同构成通透空间。 creates the cozy vintage environment, with aged books, antique wood, warm wall sconces, and shallow background depth. Composition: Fixed cinematic desk portrait: full-sized subject seated behind the antique desk, hands gently shaping or guiding the tiny tabletop figure, miniature placed clearly in the foreground-middle, face readable, tailoring tools arranged around the scene, and shallow depth of field. Signature Elements: Tiny self-portrait figure on the tabletop, full-sized subject shaping the miniature, antique library desk, tailoring tools, warm sconces, aged books, glowing particles, and intimate magical-realism mood. Style: Ultra-realistic cinematic magical realism with lifelike portrait texture, 8K detail, cozy vintage-library atmosphere, delicate scale illusion, and high-end storybook editorial polish. Color Palette: Fixed warm amber library glow, aged book browns, antique wood tones, soft skin tones, emerald or jewel-toned miniature dress accents, and tiny golden particle highlights. Lighting: Warm amber light from antique wall sconces, soft natural shadows, gentle highlights on face and hands, and a subtle magical shimmer around the miniature figure. Camera: Cinematic portrait framing with shallow depth of field, desk-level perspective, sharp focus on hands, face, miniature figure, and key tailoring props. Materials: 额前有轻盈碎发与不规则刘海，发丝细节清晰，带真实高光与柔顺质感。 remain visible with aged paper, wood grain, fabric texture, thread, metal scissors, miniature dress fabric, and glowing particle detail. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

promptTranslations.ru:

promptTranslations.ko:
아래 영어 이미지 생성 프롬프트를 사용하세요. 보이는 텍스트, 브랜드명, 변수 값, 매개변수는 영어로 유지하세요.
